name: arboreto
tagline: Reference/usage guide for inferring gene regulatory networks with the arboreto Python library (GRNBoost2/GENIE3, Dask).
verdict: Clean, single-file documentation skill for a legitimate scientific Python package (Aerts Lab, PyPI/Bioconda). No credential access, no network exfiltration, no hidden or manipulative instructions, no destructive commands. Install commands and cluster-connect examples are standard and transparent. highlights.summary: No explicit 'do not use when' guidance (e.g., non-expression data, non-Python environments) — a minor omission, not a safety issue.
